scenario.key_phrase: I want to compare a few options first

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good afternoon. This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Deepak?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes this is Deepak. You called regarding the courses, right?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! Thank you for showing interest in PW courses. Main aapki kuch details lena chahti hun to better help you. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 11 right now. Mumbai mein rehta hun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! And which entrance exam are you preparing for? JEE ya NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Advanced. Actually I want to get into IIT, so JEE Advanced is my target.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent choice! Since you're in 11th, you have around 16-17 months for JEE Advanced 2027. That's actually perfect timing. Have you started any preparation already?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thoda sa... but I need proper structured coaching now. What courses do you have for JEE Advanced preparation?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! For JEE Advanced, I'd recommend our JEE Lakshya 2027 batch - it's our comprehensive program with live classes, recorded lectures, test series, and doubt solving. It's priced at ₹35,999. We also have JEE Arjuna 2027 at ₹19,999 which is also great.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, that sounds expensive. What's the difference between Lakshya and Arjuna? And do you have any EMI options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Don't worry about the price! We offer 0% EMI through PW Pay. Lakshya comes to just ₹3,499/month and Arjuna at ₹1,999/month - that's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Lakshya has more live classes and premium features, while Arjuna focuses on recorded content with some live sessions.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹1,999 per month sounds more reasonable. But I want to compare a few options first before deciding. Can you tell me more about what exactly I get in Arjuna?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! JEE Arjuna includes complete syllabus coverage, 200+ recorded lectures, weekly live doubt sessions, mock tests, previous year papers, and 24/7 doubt support. It's designed specifically for serious JEE Advanced aspirants like you. Are you the one making this decision, or do you need to discuss with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually, I can decide this myself. My parents have given me the budget responsibility. But I'm still thinking... is there any trial or demo I can check first?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's great that you have the decision authority! Haan bilkul, we have a 7-day free trial where you can access sample lectures and see if you like our teaching methodology. But Deepak, with JEE Advanced prep, every month counts. Would you like me to enroll you in the trial today so you can start immediately?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, the trial sounds good. Let me try it first and then I'll decide between Arjuna and maybe looking at other options too. How do I get started with the trial?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll send you the trial access link on your registered number within 10 minutes. Deepak, just remember - you have great timing starting in 11th, and PW has helped lakhs of students crack JEE. I'm confident you'll love our approach. Shall I also schedule a follow-up call after your trial period?
